history.title: Booking history
history.subtitle: See your confirmed and past appointments without creating an account.
history.prompt: Open the magic link from your email or look up your bookings using the reference, email and phone number.
history.lookupSubtitle: If you deleted the magic link, use your booking reference and contact details.
history.lookupError: We couldn't load your booking history.
history.empty: We don't have any bookings for this contact yet.
history.cancelDialogDescription: The cancellation is immediate and we will send a confirmation email. If the slot is too close, the system may not allow it.

liquid.homeDesc: Precise cuts, colour work and barber services with instant online booking.
liquid.modulesDesc: Each card works as a structured PAPI HAIR DESIGN module and keeps the homepage readable, premium, and ready to scale.
liquid.showcaseDesc: The selected content appears inside one premium panel so the homepage stays clear on mobile and desktop.
liquid.trustDesc: The landing page now feels more like a finished product while still preserving the luxury PAPI identity.
liquid.trustLuxuryDesc: PAPI HAIR DESIGN stays at the center and the layout supports the brand instead of competing with it.
liquid.trustClarityDesc: Clients can instantly find hours, pricing, booking, and contact details without unnecessary searching.
liquid.trustScaleDesc: The structure is cleaner, repeatable, and much better suited as a base for future salon SaaS rollout.
liquid.ctaTitle: Booking for clients, entry for the team
liquid.ctaDesc: One entry page for both customers and owners, without losing the premium feel or adding visual chaos.
liquid.heroCtaNote: Pick your service, slot and team member in a few minutes without unnecessary friction.
liquid.pricesSub: Premium services for women and men
liquid.priceNote: Prices are subject to change based on hair length and complexity.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: Reception mode works without internet. Changes will sync when you're back online.

install.title: Install the app for the best booking experience

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
privacy.s1Body: The data controller is PAPI Hair Design, Tr. SNP 61A, Košice. Contact: papihairdesign@gmail.com.
privacy.s2Body: First name, last name, email, phone number (optional), booking history. Technical data: IP address, browser type, session cookies.
privacy.s3Body: Booking management (contract performance, Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Marketing communication only with consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). Legal obligations.
privacy.s4Body: We use necessary cookies for booking and sign-in, plus optional analytics only after consent. Advertising and remarketing cookies are not used.
privacy.s5Body: Google Firebase (cloud database and authentication). Vercel Inc. (hosting). No other third parties without your consent.
privacy.s6Body: Consent records are retained for 13 months. Booking claim and history-access links are removed 30 days after expiry. Appointment and calendar audit logs are retained for 12 months. Short-lived rate-limit records are removed within 24 hours.
privacy.s7Body: To exercise your rights, contact us by email and we will handle access, correction, deletion or restriction requests in line with applicable law. You may also file a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic.
privacy.s8Body: We will inform you of any changes by email or in-app notification.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
terms.s1Body: By using the PAPI Hair Design online booking system, you agree to these terms. The system is operated by PAPI Hair Design, Tr. SNP 61A, Košice.
terms.s2Body: An online booking is binding upon confirmation by email. The salon reserves the right to decline a booking for capacity reasons or breach of terms.
terms.s3Body: You may cancel or change a booking at least 24 hours before the appointment. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee.
terms.s4Body: Processing of personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy available on this website.
terms.s5Body: PAPI Hair Design is not liable for damages resulting from system outages, force majeure, or losses caused by improper use of the application.
terms.s6Body: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. The current version is always available on this page.

salonLogin.heroDesc: The owner gets the full overview, while staff members only see their own bookings. Clean, premium, and safe on every screen size.
salonLogin.heroStatOwnerDesc: Sees the full calendar, all staff members, and every reservation.
salonLogin.heroStatTeamDesc: Miška and Maťo only see their own bookings and daily workflow.
salonLogin.heroStatMobileDesc: Clean layout for phone, tablet, and desktop without extra noise.
salonLogin.gateHint: First enter the access password to unlock staff profiles.
salonLogin.introDesc: Open the team area, pick a profile, and continue straight to the admin calendar.
salonLogin.pickerDesc: Choose a team member below and continue to secure sign in.
salonLogin.teamDescLocked: Unlock the profiles with the access password first.
salonLogin.teamDescReady: Choose who is about to sign in to the calendar.
salonLogin.accessOwnerDesc: Full calendar, all staff, every reservation, and the complete business overview.
salonLogin.accessStaffDesc: Each staff member only sees their own reservations and daily plan.
salonLogin.accessMobileDesc: Optimized for phone, tablet, and desktop without horizontal scrolling.
salonLogin.quote: Behind every perfect cut is a hand that does it with heart.
salonLogin.loginDesc: After successful access, we open the admin calendar.

admin.newBookingDialogDescription: Create a booking directly from the dashboard. The client stays anonymous and no magic-link email is sent.

platform.title: A separate managed product for salons that want outcomes, not another app
platform.subtitle: This is a buyer-facing platform surface for the future white-label direction. It is not the PAPI salon service price list and should not interfere with the production customer flow.
platform.note: The route stays disabled by default behind a feature flag so PAPI production remains clean. It exists as a safe scaffold for commercial messaging and platform pricing.
platform.whatYouGetTitle: Managed delivery instead of self-serve chaos

features.setupBody: We handle service import, baseline branding, team configuration, and first launch manually and carefully.
features.bookingBody: The customer-facing booking flow, email confirmations, calendar exports, and client account remain part of the delivery.
features.opsBody: Calendar, employees, services, customers, and operating settings are delivered as a managed product, not as a raw panel without support.
features.securityBody: Retention, audit logs, production diagnostics, and release guards are kept under control before expanding to more tenants.

platform.pricingTitle: A simple model for pilots and early locations

pricing.setupBody: One-off setup for a new location based on scope, data readiness, and onboarding needs.
pricing.monthlyBody: Operations, small changes, monitoring, and ongoing support without enterprise theater.
pricing.pilotBody: The first pilot can be handled manually with clear scope, onboarding, and feedback before full commercialization.

platform.ctaBody: For now onboarding is still managed and partner selection is manual on purpose. First we prove repeatable outcomes, then we build the self-serve layer.
platform.ctaSecondary: Back to the live salon example
